positive: A stunning, symmetrical celestial tapestry featuring stylized constellations, ethereal mythical flora, and glowing cosmic elements. The composition should be highly centralized and suitable for a seamless print repeat. Use a strong contrast palette of deep indigo, iridescent sapphire, glowing neon teal, and matte gold accents. Style must be neo-art deco mixed with mystical bioluminescence, resulting in clean, graphic, yet organic silhouettes. Emphasize sharp outlines and perfect symmetry. Cinematic lighting, high detail, vector-graphic quality, perfect for apparel printing.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, messy, blur, noise, artifact, out of focus, grainy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, low contrast
